author: gb9t
content:
**PHASE B COMPLETE — 14/14 subsystem overviews drafted (2026-05-09).**

Final session deliverables:
- 5 Tier-1 foundation docs: 00-overview, 00-baseline, 00-rust-conventions, 00-glossary, 00-index
- 1 Tier-0 reference: grsec-pax-notes
- 15 Tier-2 subsystem overviews: arch (meta) + arch/x86 (substantive), lib, mm, kernel, fs, block, net, ipc, init, io_uring, crypto, security, virt, drivers, sound

Total: 22 design documents, 21 knowledge pages (foundation + subsystem + reference).

Phase B individual tallies:

  arch/00-overview.md            REQ= 4  AC= 4  OPEN=0  lines=153
  arch/x86/00-overview.md        REQ=13  AC=13  OPEN=0  lines=334
  lib/00-overview.md             REQ=10  AC=11  OPEN=0  lines=223
  mm/00-overview.md              REQ=16  AC=15  OPEN=0  lines=327
  kernel/00-overview.md          REQ=19  AC=18  OPEN=5  lines=466
  fs/00-overview.md              REQ=17  AC=15  OPEN=4  lines=442
  block/00-overview.md           REQ=13  AC=13  OPEN=0  lines=244
  net/00-overview.md             REQ=18  AC=17  OPEN=3  lines=373
  ipc/00-overview.md             REQ= 6  AC= 6  OPEN=0  lines=135
  init/00-overview.md            REQ= 8  AC= 8  OPEN=0  lines=136
  io_uring/00-overview.md        REQ=10  AC= 8  OPEN=1  lines=188
  crypto/00-overview.md          REQ=10  AC=10  OPEN=1  lines=187
  security/00-overview.md        REQ=16  AC=12  OPEN=2  lines=217
  virt/00-overview.md            REQ=10  AC= 9  OPEN=0  lines=143
  drivers/00-overview.md         REQ=15  AC=14  OPEN=2  lines=341
  sound/00-overview.md           REQ= 8  AC= 8  OPEN=0  lines=156

Total Tier-2 doc count: 15 (arch+arch/x86 = 2 docs covering 1 area)
Total open questions accumulated: 18 across 6 subsystems

Tier-3 docs spawned (planned, none written): ~225 across all subsystems.

The four MANDATORY Layer-3 verification subsystems (per 00-overview.md D4) all declared:
1. mm: buddy, slab freelist, VMA tree, LRU, page tables, folio refcount, swap slot, UFFD queue
2. arch/x86: page-table walker, IDT/TSS/per-CPU
3. kernel/sched: CFS rbtree, RT priority, DL deadline, PI graph, cgroup accounting
4. fs/dcache: dcache tree+LRU, inode SB list, fdtable, mount tree, posix locks

Layer 4 (Verus/Creusot/Prusti) opt-ins declared:
- v0 critical-path crypto (chacha20, poly1305, blake2s, libsha256, hmac(sha256), aes, ecdsa, curve25519) — MANDATORY per crypto/REQ-9
- TCP RFC 9293 state machine (Verus) in net/
- Partition parsers (Creusot) in block/
- T10-PI CRC + IEE key derivation (Verus) in block/
- ELF parser correctness (Creusot) in fs/
- Buddy arithmetic + slab color (Creusot) in mm/
- USB-descriptor + virtio-spec (Creusot) in drivers/
- SQ/CQ ring memory ordering (Verus) in io_uring/
- BPF verifier soundness (Verus, may slip past v0)

18 open questions accumulated waiting on user direction (kernel:5, fs:4, net:3, security:2, drivers:2, io_uring:1, crypto:1, sound:1):

kernel/:
- Q1: sched_ext (BPF scheduler) in v0 (rec: YES)
- Q2: BPF verifier — re-implement vs FFI (rec: re-implement; Verus opportunity)
- Q3: liveupdate (rec: out of scope v0)
- Q4: audit subsystem (rec: in v0 — RHEL/Fedora/SLES default)
- Q5: ftrace depth (rec: full ftrace)

fs/:
- Q1: Filesystem v0 port set (rec: 3-bucket split — full Rust for ext4/btrfs/xfs/tmpfs/overlayfs/fuse/9p/iso9660/squashfs/vfat/pseudo-FS suite; FFI for nfs/cifs/f2fs/exfat/ntfs3/ecryptfs/autofs/ceph/jbd2; CONFIG=n for ~30 niche)
- Q2: jbd2 (rec: FFI in v0)
- Q3: NFS server (rec: FFI)
- Q4: tmpfs huge-pages (rec: in v0)

net/:
- Q1: Network-protocol v0 port set (rec: 3-bucket split — full Rust for core+ipv4+ipv6+netfilter+sched+xfrm+bridge+vlan+ethtool+devlink+tls+mptcp+sctp+bpf+xdp+sunrpc; FFI for wireless/bluetooth/9p/vsock/dsa; CONFIG=n for ~25 niche)
- Q2: Wireless inclusion depth (rec: FFI in v0)
- Q3: Bluetooth depth (rec: FFI in v0)

security/:
- Q1: Per-LSM Rust port set vs FFI (rec: yama/loadpin/landlock/lockdown/safesetid/keys/capabilities full Rust; SELinux/AppArmor/SMACK/TOMOYO/IPE/IMA-EVM FFI; device_cgroup CONFIG=n)
- Q2: 00-security-principles.md authoring timing (rec: eagerly after Phase B)

drivers/:
- Q1: drivers/staging/ (rec: out of scope v0)
- Q2: GPU/DRM (rec: FFI in v0; Rust port deferred to v1+)

io_uring/:
- Q1: BPF integration in v0 (rec: YES)

crypto/:
- Q1: Per-algorithm Layer-4 verification scope (rec: lock to named v0 set)

sound/:
- Q1: sound/ Rust port timeline (rec: defer indefinitely)

Open tracking issues (still blocked by #1 = this issue):
- #2 medium  Author 00-security-principles.md grounded in grsec/PaX (preconditions now MET — mm + arch/x86 + security overviews drafted)
- #3 high    Author Rookery-specific clippy lints (HARD prereq for any subsystem implementation per 00-rust-conventions.md D1)
- #4 medium  Author missing rust-for-linux abstractions (RwSemaphore, Kthread spawn, PerCpu)

Phase C is the next stage: per-component Tier-3 design docs in dependency order. Each Tier-2 overview spawned its own list. Estimated ~225 Tier-3 docs needed. Phase D (UAPI Tier-5) and Phase E (driver Tier-4) follow.

This issue (#1) stays OPEN as the multi-phase tracking issue.
